{{Quote|I just want their cargo. Whatever happens to them is up to them.|"F'quallix" on his ''modus operandi''|<ref name="GG11" />}}
"'''F'quallix'''" was the alias of a [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[spice-jacker]] active in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Well-known for numerous crimes, "F'quallix" nonetheless shied away from excessive violence during jobs, and often employed local muscle.

==History==
"F'quallix"—real name unknown—was a [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[spice-jacker]] active in<ref name="GG11" /> [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="GGdate">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' states that its contents pertain to events occurring six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after ''[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi]]'', the events of which are placed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> According to his [[TracSheet]], "F'quallix" was notorious for crimes including illegal weapon possession, [[Thief/Legends|theft]], criminal conspiracy, assault, criminal trespass, and possession of stolen merchandise. "F'quallix" generally worked with a gang comprised of local enforcers and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] haulers.<ref name="GG11" />

==Personality and traits==
"F'quallix" was somewhat of an exception among [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-jackers in that he took pains to minimize casualties among crews whose [[Starship/Legends|ships]] he raided, relying on his reputation to ensure this. Such clemency did not extend as much to those on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] with whom he dealt if a deal were to sour, with "F'quallix" reportedly inflicting grievous injuries in such cases. A Nalroni male, "F'quallix" stood at a height of 1.6 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and had a muscular build and thick dark [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]].<ref name="GG11" />

==Skills and abilities==
"F'quallix" had extensive knowledge of [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]] and was incredibly streetwise and perceptive. In addition, he was adept at commanding others, and possessed technical skills, specializing in starship security systems. He could also handle a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="GG11" />

==Equipment==
"F'quallix" carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]], [[Droid Disabler|droid disabler]] and a [[Retinal disguiser|retina disguiser]], as well as a [[shipjacking kit]]. He wore [[Eye/Legends|eye]] protectors owing to a possible sensitivity to light.<ref name="GG11" />

==Behind the scenes==
"F'quallix" first appeared in ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', a [[1994]] supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Bill Smith]].<ref name="GG11" />
